mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 166 > factions > THE STAR LEAGUE REBORN In October 3058 the
mechanics.excerpt: THE STAR LEAGUE REBORN In October 3058 the leaders of the various Inner Sphere powers gathered on the Lyran capital of Tharkad accomplish peacefully what they had failed to achieve during centuries of war-_the rebirth of the Star League_ Despite the deep divisions among them the rulers of the Inner Sphere agreed join for single purpose end the Clan threat: The new Star League chose prove its strength by destroying single Clan: the Smoke Jaguars.
